summary: All new features verified: 1) Admin Panel Kit Composition tab with CRUD operations, 2) Kit chips display on Deployments BnB cards, 3) API-driven kit completeness in Inventory, 4) Mobile responsiveness for Inventory and Analytics pages. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Kit Composition CRUD: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints all working correctly
✓ Kit Composition defaults: Power Bank: 2, SSD: 2 as specified
✓ Admin Panel: Kit Composition tab shows 12 items with edit/delete buttons
✓ Deployments: BnB cards show assigned kit numbers as blue chips (KIT-01, KIT-02, etc.)
✓ Inventory: Kit Completeness uses API-driven composition (shows 'configurable in Admin Panel')
✓ Inventory Mobile: Action buttons (Transfer, Damage, Lost, Add Item) are horizontally scrollable with overflow-x-auto
✓ Analytics Mobile: Summary cards stack vertically using grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3
✓ Non-admin users correctly blocked from modifying kit composition (403 Forbidden)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration verified: Kit Composition management in Admin Panel (CRUD), kit chips on Deployments page, dynamic kit completeness from API, mobile optimization for Inventory and Analytics. The kit composition defaults are Power Bank: 2 and SSD: 2.
passed_tests: Frontend: Admin Panel Kit Composition tab exists with 12 items
Frontend: Power Bank and SSD items visible in kit composition
Frontend: Add/Edit/Delete buttons available for kit composition
Frontend: Deployments page shows kit chips (KIT-01, KIT-02, KIT-03, KIT-04)
Frontend: Inventory mobile - action buttons horizontally scrollable
Frontend: Inventory Kit Completeness shows API-driven composition
Frontend: Analytics mobile - cards stack vertically

2. Admin Panel: Can add/edit/delete kit composition items (CRUD verified)
3. Deployments: BnB cards show assigned kit numbers as blue chips
